data.description:
DETERMINING AVAILABLE WELLSPRINGS

During each scene, your surroundings grant you two different wellsprings. (See @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.handouts.JournalEntry.JHjzGHXO9qm8HVW9]{Invoker Rules})

When you perform an invocation, choose one option you have access to, then apply its effects to one creature you can see.

basic.name: Aero Blast
basic.description:
You deal 20 air damage to the target.

Target Suffers: @DMG[&step(20,25,30) air]{Air Damage}

advanced.name: Aero Hex
advanced.description:
Until the start of your next turn, the target suffers 5 extra damage from all sources that deal bolt and fire damage.

Target Receives: @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.0gA7OpsSZiQoLM79]{Aero Hex} or @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.0gA7OpsSZiQoLM79]{Aero Hex (Wellspring Expansion)}

superior1.name: Breeze
superior1.description:
The target recovers 30 Hit Points.

Target Recovers: @GAIN[&step(30,40,50) hp]{Recover HP}

superior2.name: Twister
superior2.description:
You deal 10 air damage to the target, and they suffer dazed.

Target Suffers: @DMG[&step(10,15,20) air]{Air Damage} @EFFECT[dazed]

basic.name: Geo Blast
basic.description:
You deal 20 earth damage to the target.

Target Suffers: @DMG[&step(20,25,30) earth]{Earth Damage}

advanced.name: Geo Hex
advanced.description:
Until the start of your next turn, the target suffers 5 extra damage from all sources that deal air and ice damage.

Target Receives: @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.XneKAK7lEd344SDX]{Geo Hex} or @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.bBrv53NViJtpvdol]{Geo Hex (Wellspring Expansion)}

superior1.name: Growth
superior1.description:
The target recovers 30 Hit Points.

Target Recovers: @GAIN[&step(30,40,50) hp]{Recover HP}

superior2.name: Quicksand
superior2.description:
You deal 10 earth damage to the target, and they suffer slow.

Target Suffers: @DMG[&step(10,15,20) earth]{Earth Damage} @EFFECT[slow]

basic.name: Pyro Blast
basic.description:
You deal 20 fire damage to the target.

Target Suffers: @DMG[&step(20,25,30) fire]{Fire Damage}

advanced.name: Pyro Hex
advanced.description:
Until the start of your next turn, the target suffers 5 extra damage from all sources that deal earth and ice damage.

Target Receives: @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.P35wmm9xOT0bnImB]{Pyro Hex} or @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.4sBRI5eerg9x3eXM]{Pyro Hex (Wellspring Expansion)}

superior1.name: Burst
superior1.description:
You deal 10 fire damage to the target, and they suffer shaken.

Target Suffers: @DMG[&step(10,15,20) fire]{Fire Damage} @EFFECT[shaken]

superior2.name: Smoke
superior2.description:
The target loses 20 Mind Points and also suffers weak.

Target Suffers: @LOSS[&step(20,30,40) mp]{Lose MP} @EFFECT[weak]
